title: Critical congestion expected as Penang LRT project starts
snippet: Major traffic jams are anticipated at Komtar and the Bayan Lepas Free Industrial Zone as construction for the Penang LRT project begins. Authorities are preparing mitigation plans for these high-growth corridors.

title: Bayan Lepas stakeholders briefed on LRT Mutiara Line traffic plans
snippet: Traffic management plans (TMP) for the construction of the LRT Mutiara Line have been presented to stakeholders in Bayan Lepas to mitigate the impact on the industrial sector's logistics and employee commutes.

title: Federal government agrees to fund RM10bil Penang LRT
snippet: The federal government has greenlit RM10 billion in funding for the Penang LRT project, which will connect Georgetown to Bayan Lepas, aiming to provide a mass transit alternative to the gridlocked bridges.

title: Better public transport badly needed, say Penangites
snippet: Residents have raised concerns about the unreliability of the Rapid Penang bus service, specifically citing irregular scheduling and long wait times. The community is urging for immediate improvements to the current bus network to ease chronic traffic congestion.
